'''Etnam''' was a fleet [[Officer/Legends|officer]] and [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
Around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], Etnam was in charge of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that captured [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]]. Etnam's Star Destroyer was in a task force that also included the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']], and Etnam reported directly to [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]]. Brandl was brought to the bridge to be personally interviewed. Etnam drastically changed his mind about Brandl after this encounter, likely the result of a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] performed by Brandl. Etnam allowed Brandl to roam the Star Destroyer unsupervised.<ref name="The Final Exit" />
